creator: gslin@Infomath.Math.NCTU.edu.tw
text:
How-To-Repeat: diff -ruN /usr/ports/news/inn/Makefile inn/Makefile --- /usr/ports/news/inn/Makefile Wed Jun 7 15:35:48 2000 +++ inn/Makefile Sun Aug 27 01:37:35 2000 @@ -6,7 +6,7 @@ # PORTNAME= inn -PORTVERSION= 2.2.2 +PORTVERSION= 2.3.0 CATEGORIES= news MASTER_SITES= ftp://ftp.isc.org/isc/inn/ diff -ruN /usr/ports/news/inn/README.html inn/README.html --- /usr/ports/news/inn/README.html Mon Jul 10 16:24:16 2000 +++ inn/README.html Sun Aug 27 01:42:51 2000 @@ -3,7 +3,7 @@

The FreeBSD Ports Collection ("news/inn")

-

You are now in the directory for the port "news/inn" (package name "inn-2.2.2"). +

You are now in the directory for the port "news/inn" (package name "inn-2.3.0").

This is the one-line description for this port: diff -ruN /usr/ports/news/inn/files/md5 inn/files/md5 --- /usr/ports/news/inn/files/md5 Sat Jan 29 05:04:33 2000 +++ inn/files/md5 Sun Aug 27 01:39:12 2000 @@ -1 +1 @@ -MD5 (inn-2.2.2.tar.gz) = a4220c321aa35cb8c2da0186755fba23 +MD5 (inn-2.3.0.tar.gz) = 8be0e895c227eeccdcbd5cb1ea23f267
